## Images with Captions


---

<figure class="captioned-image"><img src="example.jpg" alt=""><figcaption>This is a caption for the image.</figcaption></figure>



---

<figure class="captioned-image"><img src="example-figure-without-caption.jpg" alt=""></figure>


---

<figure class="captioned-image fragment"><img src="example.jpg" alt=""><figcaption>This is a caption for the flipping image fragment which will appear with its image.</figcaption></figure>
